title: Award at CLEF 2025
description: The AIIR Lab Team was selected as Best of Lab in the SimpleText track at CLEF 2025.

title: Paper accepted at SIGIR-AP 2025
description: Our work on query rewriting with LLMs, for math search, has been accepted for publication at SIGIR-AP 2025.

title: Another Year of MathMex
description: As the summer of 2025 came to an end, the AIIR Lab Version 2 of MathMex, our flagship project, supported by a grant from the NSF.
